ns0:entry.ns0:title: QuiteAFancyEmerald/InvisiProxy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/QuiteAFancyEmerald/InvisiProxy
Language: javascript
InvisiProxy LTS is a web proxy service that helps you access websites that may be blocked by your network, government or policy all within your browser with no download or setup. It does this securely and with additional privacy features. Browse Tor/Onion sites in any browser, hide browsing activity and bypass filters. (Star if you fork it!)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ToolJet/ToolJet
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet
Language: javascript
ToolJet is the open-source foundation of ToolJet AI - the enterprise app generation platform for building internal tools, dashboard, business applications, workflows and AI agents 🚀

ns0:entry.ns0:title: browserbase/skills
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/browserbase/skills
Language: javascript
Claude Agent SDK with a web browsing tool

ns0:entry.ns0:title: copy/v86
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/copy/v86
Language: javascript
x86 PC emulator and x86-to-wasm JIT, running in the browser

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cursor/plugins
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cursor/plugins
Language: javascript
Cursor plugin specification and official plugins

ns0:entry.ns0:title: liyupi/ai-guide
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/liyupi/ai-guide
Language: javascript
程序员鱼皮的 AI 资源大全 + Vibe Coding 零基础教程，分享 OpenClaw 保姆级教程、大模型玩法（DeepSeek / GPT / Gemini / Claude）、最新 AI 资讯、Prompt 提示词大全、AI 知识百科（Agent Skills / RAG / MCP / A2A）、AI 编程教程（Harness Engineering）、AI 工具用法（Cursor / Claude Code / TRAE / Codex / Copilot）、AI 开发框架教程（Spring AI / LangChain）、AI 产品变现指南，帮你快速掌握 AI 技术，走在时代前沿。本项目为开源文档，已升级为鱼皮 AI 导航网站

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/power-platform-skills
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/power-platform-skills
Language: javascript
A plugin marketplace for Claude Code/GitHub Copilot that provides Power Platform development plugins, including reusable skills, agents, and commands for building and deploying solutions.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: pbakaus/impeccable
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/pbakaus/impeccable
Language: javascript
The design language that makes your AI harness better at design.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: robinebers/openusage
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/robinebers/openusage
Language: javascript
Burning through your subscriptions too fast? Paying for stuff you never use? Stop guessing. OpenUsage is free and open source.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: serverless/serverless
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/serverless/serverless
Language: javascript
⚡ Serverless Framework – Effortlessly build apps that auto-scale, incur zero costs when idle, and require minimal maintenance using AWS Lambda and other managed cloud services.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
